steps.title: Give the application a name
steps.explanation: This is the name users see on the consent screen when signing in. Choose a clear, descriptive name such as 'MyApp Backend API' or 'Azure Clippy Extension'.

steps.title: Choose who can sign in
steps.explanation: Single tenant: only users from your own Entra ID tenant. Multitenant: users from other organizations too. Personal Microsoft accounts: for consumer apps (Xbox, Outlook.com). Choose the most restrictive option that fits your use case.

steps.title: Set the Redirect URI (optional)
steps.explanation: The Redirect URI is the URL Azure redirects to after successful authentication. For web apps, e.g. 'https://myapp.com/auth/callback'. For APIs without interactive login you can leave this empty.

steps.title: Click Register
steps.explanation: After registration you get an Application (client) ID and a Tenant ID — you need these in your application code. Next, go to 'Certificates & secrets' to create a client secret for server-to-server authentication.
